scripts.build: tsc && mkdir -p dist/public/assets/character-reader/mouth dist/public/assets/scene-samples dist/public/assets/bgm dist/public/assets/sounds && cp public/index.html public/style.css dist/public/ && cp assets/character-reader/base.png assets/character-reader/happy.png assets/character-reader/happy-mouthless.png assets/character-reader/sad.png assets/character-reader/angry.png assets/character-reader/surprised.png dist/public/assets/character-reader/ && cp assets/character-reader/mouth/closed.png assets/character-reader/mouth/a.png assets/character-reader/mouth/i.png assets/character-reader/mouth/u.png assets/character-reader/mouth/e.png assets/character-reader/mouth/o.png dist/public/assets/character-reader/mouth/ && cp assets/scene-samples/reading-room.png assets/scene-samples/desk-foreground.png dist/public/assets/scene-samples/ && cp assets/bgm/*.mp3 dist/public/assets/bgm/ && cp assets/sounds/*.mp3 dist/public/assets/sounds/
